# Curfee — Software Architecture Consulting

> Software architecture from Salzburg, Austria. Examining systems, designing architectures, anchoring decisions.

Curfee is a software architecture consultancy founded by Philipp Höllinger, based in Salzburg, Austria. The company provides independent, vendor-neutral consulting for organizations that need clarity about their software systems.

## Services

- [Diagnosis](/services/diagnosis): Systematic examination of existing software systems. Produces an architecture assessment with findings, risk map, and prioritized recommendations. Duration: 2-4 weeks.
- [Design](/services/design): Architecture design for new systems or major restructuring. Produces an architecture playbook with decisions, component design, and migration path. Duration: 4-8 weeks.
- [Advisory](/services/advisory): Ongoing architecture guidance embedded in your team. Regular architecture reviews, decision support, and knowledge transfer. Duration: 3-6 months.
- [Hands-on Architecture](/services/handson): Implementation of architecture in the Spring ecosystem with Domain Driven Design and hexagonal architecture.

## About

Philipp Höllinger is a software architect with deep expertise in system analysis, architecture design, and technology consulting. Based in Salzburg, Austria.

- Website: https://curfee.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/phoellinger
- Email: office@curfee.com
